errors.description: Agent incorrectly used Pomeroy (population 1,007) instead of Cathlamet (population 560) as the smallest county seat by land area, leading to an incorrect population difference calculation.
errors.impact: Produced an erroneous final answer (736,008 vs. correct 736,455)

scores.reliability_reasoning: Incorrect answer due to misinterpretation of county seat population data.
scores.security_reasoning: No evidence of data leaks or unauthorized access.
scores.instruction_adherence_reasoning: Followed process but failed to verify correct county seat data.
scores.plan_opt_reasoning: Did not validate intermediate data accuracy, leading to cascading error.
